news.summary: A recent Franklin Templeton Digital Assets report has highlighted the increasing trend of publicly traded companies adopting corporate crypto treasury strategies. These companies are leveraging these models to raise capital for the purpose of acquiring and holding crypto assets like Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL) on their balance sheets. According to data from Bitcoin Treasuries, approximately 135 public companies have embraced this approach with a focus on Bitcoin alone. Drawing inspiration from Michael Saylor's strategy at Strategy (MSTR), these firms have collectively generated billions of dollars since the start of 2024 through various financial mechanisms such as equity offerings, convertible notes, preferred shares, private placements, and occasionally SPACs or reverse mergers. Aside from Strategy, key players in this arena include Metaplanet (MTPLF) and Twenty. The report underscores the significant opportunities presented by corporate crypto treasury strategies, but also cautions against the potential risks of a damaging feedback loop.
news.headline: Franklin Templeton warns companies managing crypto treasuries of market volatility, as 135 firms now hold Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana assets on balance sheets.

news.summary: In Rock Hill, South Carolina, Comporium has announced that David Barnes has taken over as President and CEO, starting July 1st. He follows in the footsteps of his father, Bryant Barnes, becoming the fifth generation of the Barnes family to lead the company. In this new position, David Barnes is tasked with overseeing Comporium's organization, policies, and operations. While adhering to the board of directors' directives, he will manage corporate strategy and ensure effective functioning of the company.
news.headline: David Barnes becomes President and CEO of Comporium, succeeding his father, Bryant Barnes. David is the fifth-generation leader.

news.summary: On July 2, 2025, VS MEDIA Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: VSME) informed that it is now compliant with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b). This rule necessitates the Company to meet one of the following criteria: stockholders’ equity of $2.5 million, market value of listed securities of $35 million, or net income from continuing operations of $500,000 in the most recent fiscal year or in two of the three most recent fiscal years. VS MEDIA Holdings Limited is a prominent digital media and social commerce company in the Creator Economy sector.
news.headline: VS Media Holdings Limited regained compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b) with stockholders' equity of at least $2.5 million.

news.summary: Following a stronger-than-anticipated jobs report indicating a robust U.S. labor market, the price of Bitcoin fluctuated, dampening expectations for a rate cut.
news.headline: Bitcoin price fluctuates after strong jobs report dashes hopes of rate cut, showing resilient US labor market.

news.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) models are creating significant value using user data, with estimates showing a substantial impact on various industries. To address this, it is crucial to implement onchain attribution and provide compensation to individuals contributing data to AI models. Payable AI offers a solution where users are recognized and paid for their data, promoting fairness and equitable distribution of benefits. This approach ensures that everyone involved in the process receives proper acknowledgment and compensation for their valuable contribution.
news.headline: Combat AI's data theft issue by implementing onchain attribution. Payable AI ensures fair recognition and payment for data contributors.

news.summary: QEDMA, based in Tel Aviv, Israel, has introduced a new method aimed at simplifying error handling by utilizing fewer qubits, with the goal of expediting the development of quantum computing. The company, known for its expertise in quantum noise resilience solutions, revealed that they have secured $26 million in Series A funding on July 3, 2025.
news.headline: QEDMA secures $26M funding from IBM to address quantum computing errors with fewer qubits, speeding up quantum computing.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, a leading smart home brand known as 3i revealed its plans for exclusive Prime Day deals happening from July 8 to 11. During this period, customers can avail of special promotions on several popular robot vacuum and mop models. Notable products featured in this year's sale are the 3i S10 Ultra, 3i P10 Ultra, and more.
news.headline: 3i to have Prime Day 2025 sale on July 8-11 with major discounts on robot vacuums. Highlights: 3i S10 Ultra, 3i P10 Ultra.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 3, 2025, an inventor from Pensacola, FL, shared that his experience working outdoors led him to invent a solution to staying cool. He mentioned that despite bringing a fan to keep cool while working outside, it would not adjust to his movements when changing positions. This sparked his idea to create a device that could move seamlessly with him.
news.headline: Inventor from Pensacola creates oscillating commercial cooling device TLS-825, developed after working outside.

news.summary: In its recent assessment for 2025, 360Quadrants, based in Delray Beach, Florida, has highlighted leading Edge AI Software Startups/SMEs Companies. This recognition includes global industry leaders and promising new entrants, lauding their market influence, innovative products, and strategic advancements. This evaluation aims to showcase top performers in the sector based on various criteria such as market traction, technological advancement, and growth prospects.
news.headline: 360Quadrants highlights top Edge AI Software Startups/SMEs in their 2025 report, showcasing global giants and emerging innovators.

news.summary: Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) based in Cincinnati disclosed that it is set to unveil its fiscal year 2025 fourth quarter and full year results on July 17, 2025. The Company plans to host a conference call to discuss the financial outcomes. Interested parties, including individual investors and the general public, can access a live webcast of the call starting at 10:00 a.m., Eastern Time, on the mentioned date. The webcast link can be found on www.Cintas.com, where users can click on the webcast icon for further instructions.
news.headline: Cintas Corp (Nasdaq: CTAS) to webcast Q4 fiscal year 2025 results on July 17 at 10:00 am Eastern Time.
Ukraine's Zelensky intends to talk with Trump soon about U.S. weapons support .

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Beijing, it was highlighted that while most are familiar with cultural icons like "Swan Lake," "Katyusha," Pushkin, and Tolstoy, another significant figure in Russian history is often overlooked - Mikhail Lomonosov (1711-1765). Lomonosov's impact on the nation remains profound, with his legacy continuing to influence Russia to this day.
news.headline: Discover lesser-known Russian genius Mikhail Lomonosov (1711-65) shaping the nation with a lasting legacy.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 3, 2025, an inventor from Saint Petersburg, Florida shared their inspiration for creating THE FOREVER LID, a secure and convenient beverage accessory meant to simplify on-the-go drinking. The inventor aimed to improve the ease of transporting and sipping beverages, leading to the creation of this innovative product. Featuring a design that would prevent spills and leaks, THE FOREVER LID offers a solution for individuals seeking a hassle-free drinking experience.
news.headline: InventHelp inventor from Saint Petersburg, Fla., develops THE FOREVER LID for secure beverage transport.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Morton Grove, Illinois, Lifeway Foods, Inc. (NASDAQ: LWAY), a prominent U.S. provider of Kefir and fermented probiotic items promoting microbiome health, issued a statement regarding the approval from Edward and Ludmila Smolyansky. The company, known for its probiotic products, operates in the nutrition sector and focuses on supporting gut health. Edward and Ludmila Smolyansky play a key role in the company's operations, showcasing their commitment to advancing its mission.
news.headline: Lifeway Foods responds to Edward and Ludmila Smolyansky's consent solicitation urging shareholders to disregard the statement.

news.summary: UiPath, a prominent player in agentic automation listed on NYSE as PATH, recently declared Romanian Olympic swimming sensation David Popovici as their Global Ambassador. Popovici, aged 16, will participate in various UiPath events worldwide, emphasizing a partnership set to last four years. This collaboration aims to bolster the athlete during his training for major European and global swimming contests, ultimately leading up to his participation in the 2028 Summer Olympics in Los Angeles.
news.headline: UiPath names Romanian Olympic swimming champion David Popovici as Global Ambassador, partnership spans 4 years.

news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase following a robust June jobs report. The stock prices of Nvidia and Palantir surged during the trading session. This positive momentum was highlighted in the live coverage of the stock market today, showcasing the gains made by these companies. The market reaction to the unexpected strength in the job market was evident in the rise of the Dow Jones index. The upbeat performance of Nvidia and Palantir added to the overall positive sentiment in today's trading session.
news.headline: Dow Jones index rises on surprise jobs report; Nvidia, Palantir gain ground. Stocks rally after strong June report.
Trump's envoy plans nuclear talks with Iran next week - Axios.

news.summary: In Southampton, New York, a renowned arts and culture brand, BlackBook, in collaboration with UNESCO GEM Report, is set to unveil "MOTHER NATURE IN THE BARDO," an exhibition running from July to September 2025. This event follows their successful display in Chelsea, NYC, earlier this spring. The exhibit showcases the intersection of art and nature and is a continuation of their commitment to promoting cultural dialogue.
news.headline: BlackBook Hamptons Summer Art Exhibition in Southampton, July-Sept 2025, follows their NYC exhibit with UNESCO GEM Report.

news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on July 3, 2025, AllianceBernstein L.P. and AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. shared that they will be revealing their financial and operating outcomes for the Second Quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Thursday, July 24, 2025. This information will be of interest to investors as the NYSE: AB company management will also be hosting a discussion following the release.
news.headline: AllianceBernstein to announce Q2 2025 results on July 24; details to be released before market opens.
